privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for azure_devops_server_env organize_regression_test_suite task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely because it attempts to retrieve the non-existent task_result.json output file. The expected test plan name ('v1.0 Release Plan'), static suite name ('Checkout Module'), target test cases ('Checkout with Credit Card', etc.), query suite name ('Smoke Tests'), and target priority (1) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt description and verifier logic.
